ogTitle: Macquarie Hills vs Macquarie Marshes: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Macquarie Hills and Macquarie Marshes.
heading: Macquarie Hills vs Macquarie Marshes — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macquarie Hills, New South Wales and Macquarie Marshes, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macquarie Marshes has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Macquarie Hills (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macquarie Hills or Macquarie Marshes safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macquarie Hills has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Macquarie Marshes scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macquarie Hills scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Macquarie Marshes scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macquarie Hills or Macquarie Marshes?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macquarie Marshes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
